source: IADC Well Control Database — Middle East 2014 Q3
description: Loss of primary well barrier during workover operations. HAL documented as drilling services provider on well. Mud weight adjustment resolved kick.

source: HAL 10-K 2017 — Legal Proceedings / Risk Factors (Saudi operations)
description: Downhole safety valve (DHSV) malfunction reported during well intervention. HAL supplied completion equipment. Disclosed in HAL SEC filing risk factors.

hal_role: Active service contractor at affected facilities
source: US EIA, Saudi Aramco press release 2019-09-14; HAL 10-K 2019 risk disclosure
description: Attack on Abqaiq processing facility and Khurais oil field temporarily halted ~5.7 million bpd. HAL had active well services contracts at both facilities. Disclosed as material risk in HAL 2019 10-K filing.

source: Aramco 2020 Sustainability Report — Contractor HSE Statistics
description: Saudi Aramco 2020 Sustainability Report discloses contractor TRIR (Total Recordable Incident Rate) of 0.24 per 200,000 hours. HAL is among top 5 service contractors by manhours on Aramco assets. Specific HAL incidents not itemised — reported under contractor pool.

source: SPE-211234 — Well Integrity Case Study, Arabian Gulf (2022)
description: SPE paper documents casing integrity issue in offshore Aramco well. Cement job performed by major oilfield services company (unnamed in paper but consistent with HAL cementing contract scope for Marjan IK). Remediated via squeeze cementing.
